version: AMOS Daily Market Brief Template v0.1
purpose: A daily pre-market / post-market report format that turns AMOS engines into a usable decision dashboard.

pre_market.purpose: Define market regime, event pressure, watch levels, and action plan before trading.

post_market.purpose: Review what changed, validate or reject thesis, update stock personality and risk state.

weekend_review.purpose: Deep review of cycle, portfolio migration, thesis health, and personal behavior.

market_regime.risk_bias: Selective risk-on, no blind high-beta chase
supporting_evidence: AI Infra remains primary theater in current model
Space/Quantum/Power rising appears more like expansion than confirmed rotation
Risk appetite not broken in sample state
counter_evidence: High-beta second-line names may be increasingly crowded
Event pressure around NVDA/OPEX can produce good-news fade
what_would_change_my_mind: NVDA and AI leaders underperform QQQ
10Y/MOVE/DXY rise together and high-multiple growth sells off
Tail names outperform while leaders flatten

required_watch: Does good news create continuation or fade?
Does Optical follow leaders or diverge?
Does Gamma pin or release volatility?

portfolio_dashboard.risk_stack_summary: CRDO has highest event/crowding risk; HOOD/IREN are reset-watch not immediate full-build.

positions.action_bias: Hold / No Chase / Trim if exhaustion
positions.why: AI Infra + Optical strong, but valuation/crowding/event pressure elevated.
positions.invalidation: Breaks AVWAP, loses relative strength, revisions down.

positions.why: Optical theme supports it, but opportunity cost rises if it lags CRDO/COHR.
positions.invalidation: Weak guidance, margin pressure, underperformance vs peers.

positions.why: Dual upside but liquidity/BTC risk not mature enough.
positions.invalidation: BTC loses structure or AI compute thesis weakens.

positions.why: BTC finance opportunity possible, but headline dip alone is not maturity.
positions.invalidation: Regulatory pressure expands or BTC remains liquidation regime.

trim: LITE if Optical stays strong but LITE lags
no_trade_rules: No chasing high-beta tail names after missed ASTS-like move
No buying HOOD/IREN solely because of headline dip
No turning failed swing into core

behavior_guardrails.today_main_risk: Chasing new hot themes or refusing to trim overextended winners.
forbidden_actions: Chase tail names without leader confirmation
discipline_reminders: High位利润是真钱，Narrative未来不是现金。
Panic maturity requires evidence, not just red candles.
